description: White House statistics infographic card. The background is a darkened nighttime photo of Memphis's Beale Street entertainment district, with neon signage faintly visible (including a Hard Rock Cafe guitar sign) and a street receding into the distance, dimmed nearly to black. White typography is layered on top: a serif intro line 'Since the establishment of the' followed by a large bold all-caps serif title 'MEMPHIS SAFE TASK FORCE:', a thin white horizontal divider rule, and then a vertical list of bold sans-serif statistics: '7,416 Arrests', '1,219 Illegal Firearms Seized', '150 Missing Children Located', '772 Known Gang Members Arrested'. A small white White House seal sits centered at the bottom.
notable_text: Since the establishment of the MEMPHIS SAFE TASK FORCE: 7,416 Arrests; 1,219 Illegal Firearms Seized; 150 Missing Children Located; 772 Known Gang Members Arrested
